mapper.update:
update emp_attendance_record
check_in_time = #{checkInTime},
check_out_time = #{checkOutTime},
state = #{state},
department_id = #{departmentId},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select ear.id, ear.user_id, ear.attendance_date, ear.check_in_time, ear.check_out_time, ear.state, ear.department_id, ear.create_time, ear.update_time, COALESCE(e.name, su.name) as userName, sd.name as departmentName from emp_attendance_record ear left join sys_user su on ear.user_id = su.id left join emp e on su.id = e.user_id left join sys_dept sd on ear.department_id = sd.id where ear.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM emp_attendance_record WHERE attendance_date = #{today}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM emp_attendance_record WHERE state = #{state}

SELECT DATE(attendance_date) as date, COUNT(*) as totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN state = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as normalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN state = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lateCount, SUM(CASE WHEN state = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as earlyCount, SUM(CASE WHEN state = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as bothCount FROM emp_attendance_record WHERE attendance_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(attendance_date) ORDER BY date ASC
